title: Crystallisation of West Nile virus NS2B-NS3 protease in P64 (PDB ID: 8CO8)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9rjvo","text":"West Nile virus NS2B-NS3 innactive fusion protease was crystallized using vapor diffusion in Morpheus screen conditions at pH 8.5. Hexagonal rod-shaped crystals grew to ~50 μm in length after 14 days at 20°C. The crystals belonged to space group P64 and diffracted to 1.91 Å resolution at Diamond Light Source beamline I04. The structure has been deposited as PDB ID 8CO8. In this version, we added the Addgene id of the plasmid used for the protein expresssion and purification.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"anms4","text":"Follow all handling warning for the chemicals used in the crystalllisation screen composition.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"f7voj","text":"Morpheus screen single reagent F12 2-24, Catalog # MDSR-46-250-","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5gen2","text":"Morpheus crystal screen (https://moleculardimensions.com/en/product/MD1-47)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":25,"length":49}],"data":{}},{"key":"c1j56","text":"SwissCI 3 lens crystallization plates https://swissci.com/product/3-lens-crystallisation-plate/ Codes:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":96,"length":6}],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":38,"length":57}],"data":{}},{"key":"du9f3","text":"Midi: UVXPO-3LENS 3W96T-PS 3W96T-UVP","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":5}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4mef6","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"acrd5","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"47lim","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d77br","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9ttu6","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"7EB434EC908611EF9F100A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://moleculardimensions.com/en/product/MD1-47"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"ACCED8A84DC311EE80FB0A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://swissci.com/product/3-lens-crystallisation-plate"}}}}
steps: Protein and buffer requirements: 30 µL 94 mg/mL Sample 30 µL, Morpheus screen well F12 or tube 2-24

Drop ratio: 1:2 (50 nL Sample : 100 nL reservoir solution) Final drop volume: 150 nL Dispense 30 µL, Crystallisation screen into SwissCI 3 lens plate reservoir wells using the Liquidator. Dispense 50 nL 94 mg/mL Sample to each lens using the SPT mosquito. Dispense 100 nL, Crystallisation screen to each lens using the SPT mosquito.
Crystallisation screen composition: 0.12 Molarity (M) Monosaccharides 0.1 Molarity (M) buffer system 3 pH 8.5 37.5 % v/v precipitant mix 4

Crystal first observed and harvested on day 14. Crystals typically form hexagonal rods approximately 50 μm in size. Morphology: Hexagonal rods. Size: ~50 μm in length, 20 μm in width, 20 μm in depth Appearance : varied sized of hexagonal rods Average resolution: 1.9 Å Space group: P6 4 Unit cell: 56 Å, 56 Å, 103 Å 90.00°, 90.00°, 120.00° Exemplar picture of West Nile NS2B-NS3 protease crystals.

Incubate at 20 °C for 336:00:00, hours (14 days) in Formulatrix Rock Imager. Imaging Schedule : The first images are taken after 12 h and the imaging schedule follows a Fibonacci sequence of days for further collections.
Formulatrix Rock Imager (or incubator of choice) SPT mosquito Liquidator 96 5-200 µl pipette (or pipette of choice) SwissCI 3 lens plate

Diamond Light Source Unattended Data Collection (UDC) Data Collection Temperature: 100K Detector: DECTRIS EIGER2 X 9M Beamline: I04 Wavelength: 0.9537 Å Resolution (Å): 1.91 Beam Size (μm): 30 X 20 Number of images: 3600 Oscillation: 0.10° Exposure (s): 0.0053 Transmission (%): 100 Flux (ph/s): 9.50e+11

The protein was purified and expressed using the following protocol using an inactive construct of NS2B-NS3. Details in the protocol below. WNV NS2B-NS3 protease (catalytically active, self cleave); West Nile NS2B-NS3 fusion addgene Catalog #204795 West Nile Virus NS2B-NS3 inactive fusion protease expression and purification: large scale 1 L cultures by Michael Fairhead
creator: Peter Marples
